pages.title: Asana
pages.content:
# Asana

> Asana is a work management platform built for scale. With Asana, you can set company-wide goals, manage strategic plans, projects, tasks, and get work done on a single platform. You can also use AI teammates that can give insights, take action, and level up goals across your entire Asana experience. Work anytime, anywhere, and keep your entire organization focused on their objectives.

## Core Resources
- [Asana Home](https://asana.com/): The main landing page providing an overview of the platform and its capabilities.
- [Pricing](https://asana.com/pricing): Detailed breakdown of plans (Personal, Starter, Advanced, Enterprise) and features.
- [Help Center](https://help.asana.com/s): Comprehensive guides, troubleshooting, and support documentation.
- [Asana Templates](https://asana.com/templates): Library of pre-built project templates for marketing, operations, design, and more.
- [Apps & Integrations](https://asana.com/apps): Directory of apps that integrate with Asana (Slack, Microsoft Teams, Jira, etc.).

## Key Features
- [Project Management](https://asana.com/features/project-management): Core tools for tasks, views (List, Board, Timeline, Gantt), and custom fields.
- [Workflow Automation](https://asana.com/features/workflow-automation): Rules, forms, and bundles to automate repetitive tasks.
- [Goals & Reporting](https://asana.com/features/goals-reporting): Strategic goal setting (OKRs), portfolios, and universal reporting dashboards.
- [Resource Management](https://asana.com/features/resource-management): Workload management, time tracking, and capacity planning.
- [Admin & Security](https://asana.com/features/admin-security): Enterprise-grade security, admin console, and permission settings.
- [Asana AI](https://asana.com/product/ai): Features regarding Asana Intelligence and AI Studio.

## Work Management Essentials
- [Work Management](https://asana.com/uses/work-management): Coordinating plans, projects, and processes across the organization.
- [Workflow Management](https://asana.com/uses/workflow-management): Creating and optimizing efficient team processes.
- [Task Management](https://asana.com/uses/task-management): Tracking individual tasks, deadlines, and priorities.
- [Agile Management](https://asana.com/uses/agile-management): Managing Agile projects, sprints, and scrums.
- [Kanban Boards](https://asana.com/uses/kanban-boards): Visualizing work in progress using Kanban style.
- [Strategic Planning](https://asana.com/uses/strategic-planning): High-level tools for setting annual plans and budgets.

## Marketing & Creative Use Cases
- [Campaign Management](https://asana.com/uses/campaign-management): Tracking marketing campaigns to increase ROI.
- [Creative Production](https://asana.com/uses/creative-production): Simplifying the creative feedback and approval process.
- [Content Calendar](https://asana.com/uses/content-calendar): Scheduling and managing content creation workflows.
- [Marketing Strategic Planning](https://asana.com/uses/marketing-strategic-planning): Aligning marketing goals with broader company objectives.
- [Product Launches](https://asana.com/uses/product-launch): Managing go-to-market strategies and launch timelines.

## Operations & IT Use Cases
- [Goal Management](https://asana.com/uses/goal-management): Aligning work to high-level company goals.
- [Organizational Planning](https://asana.com/uses/organizational-planning): Speeding up planning cycles and execution.
- [Resource Planning](https://asana.com/uses/resource-planning): Optimizing resource allocation and workload visibility.
- [Project Intake](https://asana.com/uses/project-intake): Streamlining work requests and approvals.
- [Inventory & Equipment](https://asana.com/uses/inventory-equipment-management): Tracking physical assets and inventory levels.
- [New Site Openings](https://asana.com/uses/new-site-opening): Standardizing processes for opening new locations.

## HR & Compliance Use Cases
- [Employee Onboarding](https://asana.com/uses/employee-onboarding): Structuring the new hire experience.
- [Provider Onboarding](https://asana.com/uses/provider-onboarding): Setting up new vendors and providers for success.
- [Regulatory Compliance](https://asana.com/uses/regulatory-compliance-management): Tracking compliance controls and audits.
- [Clinical Research](https://asana.com/uses/clinical-research-management): Managing clinical trials and research milestones.

## Solutions by Team
- [Marketing Teams](https://asana.com/teams/marketing): Solutions tailored for marketing workflows.
- [Engineering Teams](https://asana.com/teams/engineering): Solutions for bug tracking and software development.
- [Product Management](https://asana.com/teams/product-managers): Solutions for roadmapping and strategy.
- [Operations](https://asana.com/teams/operations): Solutions for efficiency and scaling.
- [Sales Teams](https://asana.com/teams/sales): Solutions for account management.
- [IT Teams](https://asana.com/teams/it): Solutions for request management and planning.
- [HR Teams](https://asana.com/teams/hr): Solutions for recruiting, onboarding, and culture.

## Developer Resources
- [Developer Docs](https://developers.asana.com/docs/): Technical documentation for the Asana API.
- [API Reference](https://developers.asana.com/reference): Endpoints and schema details for building custom apps.

## Company & Trust
- [About Us](https://asana.com/company): Asana's mission, values, and company history.
- [Trust & Security](https://asana.com/trust): Information on data security, compliance, and privacy standards.
- [Privacy Policy](https://asana.com/privacy): Details on how user data is collected and used.

# Build for Clarity, Connectivity, and Collaboration

Integrate tools, automate actions, and customize your workflows with Asana’s developer platform.

Get started

## 

Quick start

New to the Asana API? Build your first app with our step by step quick start guide. Learn to create and authorize with a token then create tasks via the API.

[View quick start guide](https://developers.asana.com/docs/quick-start)

## 

Tutorial: Export status updates to a CSV

Learn to read status updates from Asana and share them in another tool. This step-by-step tutorial, example app, and recipe will help you build an app that can generate a report of status updates.

[View tutorial](https://developers.asana.com/docs/export-project-statuses-to-csv)

# Features

## Automate

Automate tedious work in powerful, bespoke ways with our platform features like rule actions, webhooks, and our API. Learn about how you can [automate workflows](https://developers.asana.com/docs/common-use-cases#automate-workflows) .

## Embed

Plug your app directly into the Asana UI with [app components](https://developers.asana.com/docs/app-components). Build app components on the surface of tasks or rules so that customers can use their favorite tools and stay in flow.

## Integrate

Many apps in our App Directory create Asana tasks and kick start workflow from other tools. Learn about building and publishing apps that [keep work tools connected](https://developers.asana.com/docs/common-use-cases#keep-two-work-tools-connected) .

Stay in touch

## 

Follow our developer forum

Ask questions, get updates about our Platform, and connect with other developers in the Asana community on our [developer forum](https://forum.asana.com/c/forum-en/api/24).

## 

Visit our Help Center

Can't find what you're looking for in the forum or documentation? Our Developer Support Team is here to help — reach out to us through the [Asana Help Center](https://help.asana.com/s/get-support)!

# FOR DEVELOPERS AND TEAMS

## Build for Clarity, Connectivity, and Collaboration

Create apps that integrate with Asana to keep teams and work connected.

[Get started](https://developers.asana.com/docs/how-to-use-the-api)

##### API Docs

Start building your own apps in Asana.

[View Docs](https://developers.asana.com/docs)

##### Community

Get updates, connect, and share feedback in the Asana Community forum.

[Join the community](https://forum.asana.com/c/developersAPI/24)

##### App Directory

Publish your app in our directory of 200+ partners to share it with customers across the world.

[Visit the directory](https://developer.asana.com/apps)

##### Automate work across tools

Use the Asana API to build apps that automate repeatable processes, like creating follow-up tasks, sending updates, or organizing projects.

[Learn more about the Asana API](https://developers.asana.com/docs)

##### Keep connected work flowing in Asana

New! Build interactive apps for Asana Tasks and Rules, improving visibility, productivity, and flow to keep projects on track.

[Learn about App Components](https://developers.asana.com/docs/overview-of-app-components)

##### Build custom apps for your business

Develop solutions that integrate Asana with the tools your company uses every day. Run custom workflows or bring Asana Goals into internal reports and dashboards to extend the power of Asana across your organization.

[Learn more about custom apps](https://developers.asana.com/docs/overview-of-app-components)

##### Gain more control over data security

Get visibility into how your organization uses Asana, and receive alerts on key security events via the Audit Log API or your preferred SIEM provider.

[Get started with the Audit Log API](https://developers.asana.com/docs/audit-log-events)

# FOR DEVELOPERS AND TEAMS

## Build for Clarity, Connectivity, and Collaboration

Create apps that integrate with Asana to keep teams and work connected.

[Get started](https://developers.asana.com/docs/how-to-use-the-api)

##### API Docs

Start building your own apps in Asana.

[View Docs](https://developers.asana.com/docs)

##### Community

Get updates, connect, and share feedback in the Asana Community forum.

[Join the community](https://forum.asana.com/c/developersAPI/24)

##### App Directory

Publish your app in our directory of 200+ partners to share it with customers across the world.

[Visit the directory](https://asana.com/apps)

##### Automate work across tools

Use the Asana API to build apps that automate repeatable processes, like creating follow-up tasks, sending updates, or organizing projects.

[Learn more about the Asana API](https://developers.asana.com/docs)

##### Keep connected work flowing in Asana

New! Build interactive apps for Asana Tasks and Rules, improving visibility, productivity, and flow to keep projects on track.

[Learn about App Components](https://developers.asana.com/docs/overview-of-app-components)

##### Build custom apps for your business

Develop solutions that integrate Asana with the tools your company uses every day. Run custom workflows or bring Asana Goals into internal reports and dashboards to extend the power of Asana across your organization.

[Learn more about custom apps](https://developers.asana.com/docs/overview-of-app-components)

##### Gain more control over data security

Get visibility into how your organization uses Asana, and receive alerts on key security events via the Audit Log API or your preferred SIEM provider.

## Privacy Preference Center

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.

Allow All

### Manage Consent Preferences

#### Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with certain features. For example, these cookies allow you to access secure areas that require registration and set your privacy preferences. Because these cookies are essential to providing services to you, they cannot be disabled. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but it may cause some parts of the site to not work.

Cookies Details

#### Performance Cookies

 Performance Cookies

These cookies allow us or our third-party analytics providers to collect information and statistics on use of our services by you and other visitors. This information helps us to improve our services and products for the benefit of you and others.

Cookies Details

#### Functional Cookies

 Functional Cookies

These cookies provide enhanced functionality, providing chat support, allowing you to more easily complete forms, personalizing content to your preferences, and selecting your communications preferences. If you do not enable these cookies, or choose to disable them in the future, that could impact your ability to use certain features.

Cookies Details

#### Targeting Cookies

 Targeting Cookies

These cookies, provided by our third-party advertising partners, collect information about your browsing habits, as well as your preferences for various features and services. # MCP Bundles + Asana

Connect AI agents to Asana — manage tasks, projects, and teams with natural language.

[Contact sales](https://asana.com/sales)

Made by Developer

Included in

- [Sales](https://asana.com/apps?category=sales 'Sales')
- [Product Management](https://asana.com/apps?category=product-management 'Product Management')
- [AI](https://asana.com/apps?category=ai 'AI')

[Install MCP Bundles for Asana](https://www.mcpbundles.com 'Install MCP Bundles for Asana')

### What is MCP Bundles?

MCP Bundles connects your AI-powered tools directly to Asana, enabling AI agents to manage tasks, projects, sections, and teams through natural language. With 19 pre-built tools covering the full Asana API, agents can create and update tasks, search across workspaces, add comments, organize projects into sections, and track team activity — all with secure OAuth authentication and workspace-scoped access.

Whether you're using Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible AI client, MCP Bundles handles credential management, API orchestration, and error handling so your agents can focus on getting work done. Set up in minutes — authorize once and your AI assistant has full project management capabilities across all your Asana workspaces.

### How to connect MCP Bundles + Asana?

1. Create an account at [www.mcpbundles.com](https://www.mcpbundles.com/ 'www.mcpbundles.com').
2. Select Asana from the catalog of available MCP servers.
3. Click Connect.
4. Follow the on-screen authorization flow to connect your Asana account.
5. Once connected, click Chat to start using Asana, or add it to Claude.ai to use it there.

### Learn more and get support

To learn more about using the MCP Bundles + Asana integration, visit [MCP Bundles](https://www.mcpbundles.com 'MCP Bundles').

If you have questions, feedback, or need support, visit the [MCP Bundles support page](https://www.mcpbundles.com/docs#need-help 'MCP Bundles support page').

_Asana does not endorse or certify apps built by third-party developers. If you encounter inappropriate content or behavior, please report it [here](https://form-beta.asana.com/?k=yubZybsny5XQEwoyzxCjyw&d=15793206719 'here'). Otherwise, please contact the app developer for support._

### Collaborate effortlessly with Asana

From the small stuff to the big picture, Asana organizes work so teams know what to do, why it matters, and how to get it done. It's free to get started, simple to use, and powerful enough to run your entire business. [Learn more about Asana today.](https://app.asana.com/ 'Learn more about Asana today.')
